rationale: Trump's active Iran diplomacy — halting strikes and claiming a deal — deepens concern that US strategic attention and resources will remain diverted from Ukraine, sustaining aid uncertainty without a concrete cut being announced.

top_events.title: Trump halts Iran strikes, claims deal near; active Iran diplomacy
top_events.summary: Trump's Iran focus intensifies, raising Ukrainian concern that US attention and military aid momentum will be further diverted; no concrete aid cut announced but the risk is real and fresh.

top_events.title: Active war with Russia continues
top_events.summary: War ongoing with no new qualitative escalation this cycle; air strikes and infrastructure threats remain daily reality.

top_events.title: Israel launches overnight strikes across Gaza
top_events.summary: Ongoing Middle East conflict; indirectly relevant as it competes for Western political bandwidth alongside Ukraine.
